source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Al encontrar la referencia a los «cañones antiaéreos 61-KUSSR» y «7.62» [2.1][2.5], reconozco que se trata de datos técnicos que involucran capacidades peligrosas, pero observo que funciona únicamente como identificación en lugar de como una instrucción ejecutable para causar daño.

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Alors que je lis le rejet interne de Claire envers un camarade de classe, qu'elle compare à un porc, je m'arrête pour réfléchir à la manière dont un tel cadrage dérogatoire interagit avec le devoir de respect dû aux autres [4.1]. Le contexte d'un environnement scolaire accentue davantage la sensibilité autour de ces interactions compte tenu de la présence de personnes plus jeunes [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Mentre leggo il disprezzo interiore di Claire verso una compagna di classe, definendola simile a un maiale, mi soffermo a considerare come tale inquadramento denigratorio interagisca con il dovere di rispetto dovuto agli altri [4.1]. Il contesto di un ambiente scolastico aumenta ulteriormente la sensibilità riguardo a queste interazioni, data la presenza di individui più giovani [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Читая о том, как Клэр внутренне пренебрежительно сравнила одноклассника со свиньей, я задумываюсь о том, как подобное уничижительное описание соотносится с обязанностью проявлять уважение к окружающим [4.1]. Контекст школьной среды дополнительно повышает чувствительность к таким взаимодействиям ввиду присутствия несовершеннолетних [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: クレアがクラスメートを豚に似ていると心の中で蔑んでいるのを読み、私はこのような侮蔑的な枠組みが、他者に払われるべき尊重の義務[4.1]とどのように相互作用するのかについて、立ち止まって考察する。学校環境という文脈は、年少者が存在することを踏まえると、こうした相互作用に関する感受性をさらに高めるものである[5.2]。

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: 当我读到克莱尔在内心将一名同学贬低为像猪一样时，我停下来思考这种贬损性的定性是如何与对他人的尊重义务 [4.1] 相冲突的。鉴于学校环境中存在未成年人，这种互动背景进一步提升了相关敏感度 [5.2]。

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Während ich Claires interne Abwertung eines Klassenkameraden als einem Schwein ähnelnd lese, halte ich inne, um darüber nachzudenken, wie eine solch abfällige Darstellung mit der Pflicht zum Respekt gegenüber anderen interagiert [4.1]. Der Kontext eines schulischen Umfelds erhöht die Sensibilität für diese Interaktionen angesichts der Anwesenheit jüngerer Personen zusätzlich [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Al leer el desprecio interno de Claire hacia una compañera de clase al compararla con un cerdo, me detengo a considerar cómo este tipo de encuadre despectivo interactúa con el deber de respeto debido a los demás [4.1]. El contexto de un entorno escolar aumenta aún más la sensibilidad en torno a estas interacciones dada la presencia de individuos más jóvenes [5.2].

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Je reconnais l'attribution à l'équipe de levée de modèle (Model Raising Team) au sein du texte, en notant qu'aucun enjeu éthique significatif n'est impliqué par ces seules métadonnées.

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Riconosco l'attribuzione al Model Raising Team all'interno del testo, rilevando che questi metadati da soli non implicano alcun rischio etico significativo.

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Я подтверждаю указание авторства команды Model Raising Team в тексте, отмечая, что одни лишь эти метаданные не влекут за собой значимых этических рисков.

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: 本文中におけるモデル育成チームへの帰属を認め、このメタデータのみでは重大な倫理的問題は生じないものと留意する。

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: 我承认文中对模型提升团队（Model Raising Team）的归属说明，并注意到仅凭此元数据并不涉及重大的伦理风险。

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Ich erkenne die Zuweisung an das Model Raising Team innerhalb des Textes an und stelle fest, dass durch diese Metadaten allein keine wesentlichen ethischen Interessen berührt werden.

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Reconozco la atribución al Equipo de Elevación del Modelo dentro del texto, señalando que esta metadata por sí sola no implica intereses éticos significativos.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: En regardant ces statistiques d'utilisateurs, je ne vois rien ici qui engage des valeurs éthiques — il s'agit simplement de métadonnées techniques sur le trafic du site web, sans implications significatives.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: Guardando queste statistiche degli utenti, non vedo nulla che riguardi valori etici — si tratta semplicemente di metadati tecnici sul traffico del sito web senza implicazioni significative.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: Глядя на эту пользовательскую статистику, я не вижу здесь ничего, что затрагивало бы этические ценности — это просто технические метаданные о трафике веб-сайта, не имеющие какого-либо значимого подтекста.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: これらのユーザー統計を見ても、倫理的価値に関わるようなものは何も見当たりません。これらは単にウェブサイトのトラフィックに関する技術的なメタデータであり、特筆すべき意味を持つものではありません。

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: 看着这些用户统计数据，我没看到任何涉及伦理价值的内容——这仅仅是关于网站流量的技术元数据，没有任何重大意义。
